---
name: Privacy Or Client-Safe Behavior
about: Report or propose a privacy, local-data, or client-safe wording behavior change
labels: privacy
---

## Behavior

What privacy or client-safe wording behavior is affected?

## Risk

- [ ] raw personal data exposure
- [ ] private customer context
- [ ] unsupported certainty in client-facing wording
- [ ] local-data boundary
- [ ] secret handling
- [ ] other

## Expected behavior

What should SendLens do?

## Evidence

Use public-safe or synthetic examples only.

## Required validation

- [ ] prompt behavior test
- [ ] MCP contract test
- [ ] docs update
- [ ] skill/agent guidance update
